scripts.dev:private: npm run content:build && PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=1 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=0 vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=0 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=1 npm run build:app && npm run check:public-dist
scripts.build:app: tsc --noEmit && vite build && npm run check:performance
scripts.build:private: npm run content:build && PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=1 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=0 npm run build:app
scripts.content:build: npm run fighter:build && npm run stage:build
scripts.test:private: npm run content:build && PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=1 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=0 vitest run
scripts.test:public-content: PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=0 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=1 vitest run src/game/publicContent.test.ts src/game/roster.test.ts src/game/content.test.ts src/ui/publicContentUi.test.ts
scripts.validate:public: npm run check:public-assets && npm run check:public-history && npm run fighter:check && npm run stage:check && npm run test:public && npm run build:public
scripts.preview: npm run check:public-dist && PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=0 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=1 vite preview --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.preview:private: npm run build:private && PRIVATE_CONTENT_MODE=1 PUBLIC_CONTENT_ONLY=0 vite preview --host 0.0.0.0
